01

Introduction

BuildHome is a personal expense tracking application designed for construction projects. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information within the app and our commitment to protecting your privacy.

Core commitment: BuildHome is built to work entirely on your device. Your data stays with you — it is never uploaded to any cloud or external server.
02

Data We Collect

BuildHome collects only what's necessary to track your construction expenses. All data is entered by you and stored locally.

🧾
Expense Data
Shop name, amount, date, category
🏗️
Project Info
Location, budget details
📞
Emergency Contacts
Contact details you choose to save
📸
Bill Photos
Images stored locally on your device
03

Data Storage

  • All data is stored locally on your device — not on any external server.
  • No data is transmitted to BuildHome or any third-party server (except for ads — see §4).
  • Deleting the app or clearing data removes it permanently; deleted data cannot be recovered.
We recommend exporting your data regularly as a backup before uninstalling or switching devices.
04

Third-Party Services

BuildHome uses Google AdMob to display advertisements. AdMob may collect certain device identifiers and usage data as described in Google's own privacy policy.

  • Provider: Google LLC
  • Purpose: Displaying in-app advertisements
  • Privacy Policy: policies.google.com/privacy

We do not control AdMob's data practices. Please review Google's policy for details on how they handle advertising data.

05

App Permissions

BuildHome requests only the permissions needed to function:

📷 Camera & Photo Gallery
💾 Storage Access
  • Camera / Photo Gallery — used to capture and attach bill images to your expense records.
  • Storage — used to save your expense data and photos on your device.

You can revoke these permissions at any time via your device's settings. Some app features may not work without them.

06

Your Rights

Since all data lives on your device, you have full control:

🔒
You Own It
All data belongs to you — always
📤
Export Anytime
Export your data whenever you need
🗑️
Delete Anytime
Remove any or all data at will
✉️

Privacy Questions?

Email: santumodak.rsg@gmail.com

Phone: +91 89449 33656

08

Policy Changes

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we make significant changes, users will be notified within the app before the changes take effect.

Continued use of BuildHome after a policy update constitutes acceptance of the revised policy. The "Last Updated" date at the top of this page reflects the most recent revision.

© 2026 BuildHome  ·  All rights reserved

This app is for personal use. Data stays on your device.
